semantics.itemContent: List item content element with text ellipsis, padding and other list item text content display styles
semantics.itemIcon: List item icon element with checkbox and other icon styles and interaction states
semantics.list: List element with list content styles, layout and scroll control
semantics.root: Root element with flex layout, transfer container base styles and layout control
semantics.section: Section element with flex layout, width, height, min height, border, border radius and other single-side transfer container styles
semantics.title: Title element with text ellipsis, flex ratio, text alignment, auto left margin and other title text layout and styles

semantics.item: Item element with tree node base styles, drag state, role attributes, indentation, switcher, content wrapper and other node structure
semantics.itemIcon: Icon element with tree node icon styles, size and state display
semantics.itemTitle: Title element with tree node title text display styles and text content
semantics.root: Root element with tree control base styles, layout and container control

semantics.content: Multiple selection container with layout, spacing, and wrapping styles for selected items
semantics.input: Input element with text input, search, selected value display and other input core interaction styles
semantics.item: Multiple selection item element with border, background, padding, and margin styles
semantics.itemContent: Multiple selection item content area with text ellipsis styles
semantics.itemRemove: Multiple selection item remove button with font-related styles
semantics.placeholder: Placeholder element with font styles and colors for placeholder text

popup.item: Popup item element with tree node option styles, hover state, selected state and other interaction states
popup.itemTitle: Popup title element with tree node title text display styles
popup.root: Popup element with dropdown tree selection panel positioning, z-index, background, border, shadow and other popup layer styles

semantics.prefix: Prefix element with prefix content layout and styles
semantics.root: Root element with tree selector base styles, border, border radius container styles
semantics.suffix: Suffix element with suffix content, clear button, dropdown arrow and other suffix area styles

semantics.item: File item element with padding, background color, border styles, hover effects, status colors, transition animations and other styles
semantics.list: File list container with layout arrangement, transition animations, spacing control and other styles
semantics.root: Root container element with layout styles, disabled text color, user-select control, cursor styles and other basic styles
